overall.description: A first-person exploration through a luxury industrial loft apartment, beginning inside a steamy modern shower, transitioning through a bathroom, and emerging into a spacious bedroom with metal grating floors and panoramic city views. The footage features high-fidelity game engine rendering with detailed materials and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a modern walk-in shower with water streaming down glass walls. The camera tilts down to reveal brass fixtures and a digital control panel before the shower door opens, revealing steam and the bathroom beyond.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shower into a steamy bathroom area with a towel rack on the left and exposed brick walls. The camera moves toward an open doorway where bright natural light from the loft space becomes visible.

segments.scene_description: Entering a spacious industrial loft bedroom with metal grating floors and floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a city skyline. The camera explores the room, passing a clothing rack and approaching a large industrial bed while steam drifts near the windows. The space features exposed ceiling beams and a dramatic view of the urban landscape outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, steamy confines of a modern shower into a vast, light-filled industrial loft bedroom. It begins inside a walk-in shower with water streaming down glass walls, tilting down toward brass fixtures and a digital panel before the door opens to reveal a mist-filled bathroom. As the camera exits the shower, it glides past a towel rack and exposed brick walls, moving steadily toward an open doorway where bright natural light begins to pierce through the steam. The scene then expands into a spacious bedroom featuring metal grating floors and exposed ceiling beams, passing a clothing rack as the camera approaches a large industrial bed. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal floor-to-ceiling windows and a dramatic city skyline, with lingering wisps of steam drifting against the urban landscape.
